data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design considers the size and distance of clickable elements to ensure ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Large, easy-to-click buttons and intuitive navigation.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing decision-making times by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Simple, uncluttered UI with clear, essential options.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: The attractive design is perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Clean design, consistent color palette, modern aesthetics.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items to enhance the website's accessibility and usability.
data.technical_spec: Strategic use of white space and consistent alignment.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design leveraging user familiarity with common e-commerce interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Standard e-commerce conventions for product browsing and checkout.
